notes: ISACA is a global association supporting IT audit, governance, and information security. Publishes COBIT and the Cybersecurity Audit Certificate. Maintains CISA/CISM/CRISC professional certifications.

match_nodes.description: COBIT — Control Objectives for Information and Related Technologies

data.official_name: Control Objectives for Information and Related Technologies
data.description: ISACA's governance and management framework for enterprise IT. COBIT 2019 is current.
